summary: Weapon/sword trail afterimage renderer. Catmull-Rom spline interpolation, triangle-strip ribbon with alpha/color fade, separate front/back face collections for proper translucency sorting.

functions.name: ringbuf_init
functions.summary: Init ring buffer — head=0, tail=0, stores pointer+capacity for spline control points.

functions.name: ringbuf_push
functions.summary: Push a 3D point into ring buffer, increment head with mask wrap. Returns 1 on success, 0 if full.

functions.name: ringbuf_pop
functions.summary: Pop a point from ring buffer via output pointer. Returns 1 on success, 0 if empty. @bug: copy-paste error — returns 0 instead of 1 on success, required-to-match.

functions.name: spline_init
functions.summary: Init Catmull-Rom spline state: initialise both ring buffers (control points + output) with capacity 3.

functions.name: spline_compute
functions.summary: Pop 4 control points, multiply by Catmull-Rom basis matrix (sCatmullRomBasis), produce 4 output coefficients. Push 3 back to control buffer (ring rotation).

functions.name: spline_add_point
functions.summary: Add new point to spline. If >= 4 control points, run spline_compute + interpolate 4 output points via forward differencing.

functions.name: spline_get_point
functions.summary: Pop an interpolated output point from the spline's output buffer. Wraps ringbuf_pop.

functions.name: trail_gt_init
functions.summary: Init GT ucode state for trail render: mode G_RM_XLU_SURF, 1-cycle, bilinear, RGBA16 LUT, no primitive.

functions.name: trail_update
functions.summary: Main trail update. Reads weapon tip/base transforms, adds spline points, builds triangle-strip vertices with alpha fade (255→0), submits to front/back draw lists for proper XLU sorting.

functions.name: shadow_init
functions.summary: Alias: initialize shadow/trail renderer state. Inits 2 splines per player per trail, 4 GT states for trail segments, 16 shadow instances with vertex colours from character config.

globals.name: sTriStrip4_0
globals.summary: Triangle strip topology for 4-vertex trail (3 tris, fan pattern)

globals.name: sTriStrip4_1
globals.summary: Triangle strip topology for 5-vertex trail (4 tris)

globals.name: sTriStrip4_2
globals.summary: Triangle strip topology for 6-vertex trail (5 tris)

globals.name: sTriStrip4_3
globals.summary: Triangle strip topology for 7-vertex trail (6 tris)

globals.name: sTriStrip5_0
globals.summary: Alternate strip topology for 5-vertex trail (4 tris, cross pattern)

globals.name: sTriStripLong
globals.summary: Pointer array to sTriStrip5_0..5_4 (used when trail length ≥ 6)

subsystems: Ring buffer: manages tail/head/mask for spline control points
Catmull-Rom spline: fixed 4x4 Hermite basis, forward differencing, 4 midpoints per segment
Trail render: reads weapon tip/base transforms, builds alpha-faded vertex strip, submits to front/back draw lists
XLU mode: G_RM_XLU_SURF, translucent ribbon with alpha from 255 → 0
open_questions: ringbuf_pop has a bug (returns 0 instead of 1 on success) — is this required-to-match?
How is the weapon tip/base transform linked to specific bones?
What distinguishes TriStrip4 vs TriStrip5 patterns (fan vs cross)?
